name: cost-estimation
description: Civil/structural cost estimation with strict domain separation. Six knowledge domains (design assumptions, productivity rates, cost bases, data sources, company policy, construction methods) plus cross-cutting skills (quantity takeoff, scheduling, risk assessment, audit/QA). Multi-market support (international, Saudi, UAE, Egypt). BOQ generation, XLSX workbooks with charts/Gantt/histograms, Executive Summary and Audit Report DOCX outputs, engineering sketches.
